summary: Frontend-only validation attempted for guest Home buttons on deployed web app. Code review confirms guest overlay bypass in AppShell, but automated click verification could not be completed due Flutter Web canvas/semantics non-queryable in this environment.

minor.issue: Guest homepage load triggers 401 in browser console on deployed app. Likely unauthorized fetch path; verify if intentionally handled for guest state.

ui_bugs.issue: Unable to assert clickability via Playwright selectors because Flutter web build exposes no queryable DOM/semantics nodes in this runtime.

integration_issues.issue: Console logs show 401 from /api/vice-permissions while unauthenticated.

action_items: Run /app/integration_test/guest_home_buttons_clickable_test.dart in an environment with Flutter SDK (flutter test integration_test/guest_home_buttons_clickable_test.dart -d chrome) to conclusively validate taps.
If web E2E via Playwright is required, enable Flutter web semantics/test hooks (or expose data-testid-like hooks) so guest buttons and bottom sheets are machine-selectable.
Review guest initialization call to /api/vice-permissions and ensure expected guest-safe handling (avoid noisy unauthorized console errors).
critical_code_review_comments: AppShellPage._wrapHomeWithInitialOverlay returns child directly for !session.isAuthenticated, preventing guest pointer interception as intended.
Existing integration test already covers both guest button flows and standalone simulation; this is the most reliable regression guard once Flutter test runtime is available.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three automation attempts were executed (role/text/semantics + coordinate fallback) on https://squadra-web.onrender.com; none could read clickable Flutter nodes. Visual screenshot shows Accedi/Registrati rendered, but programmatic click verification remained inconclusive. Use Flutter integration runner to complete validation.
rca of the issue: RCA for test blockage: deployed Flutter web appears canvas-rendered without exposed DOM button nodes/semantics in this Playwright runtime (bodyTextLen=0, buttonCount=0, semanticsCount=0). Therefore selector-based verification and modal assertions cannot be reliably executed here.
